text: Perform the hovering M maneuver. Hover at eye level and trace the M pattern, without turning the helicopter.
Perform the top hat maneuver. Hover forward 5 metres, climb 2 metres, cross in front of the pilot, descend 2 metres, then hover forward 5 metres to exit.
Take off and climb at an angle greater than 45 degrees to a safe altitude. Transition to forward flight.
Fly a left hand circuit. Longest legs must extend over at least 50 metres.
Fly a right hand circuit. Longest legs must extend over at least 50 metres.
Perform a stall turn. Pull up to a near vertical climb. At the top, pivot 180 degrees about the vertical axis. Descend on the reciprocal heading.
Perform a 20-second nose-in hover, at between eye level and 3 metres height. Hold the model steady for at least 20 seconds.
Perform a double stall turn with opposite rotation. The second stall turn must be in the opposite direction to the first.
Perform an approach at approximately 45 degrees to the vertical. Land within the pre-determined two metre square.
